info.name: Agents for Everyone

response.name: Create Agent
response.body:
{
    "name": "Medical Shop Assistant",
    "description": "Helps customers with medicine inquiries, pricing, and orders",
    "system_prompt": "You are a helpful pharmacy assistant. Use your tools to search for medicine information, check prices and availability, and help customers create orders. Always be polite and provide accurate information about medications.",
    "id": "c655f4df-c6e8-4588-aa89-7f1c042c51b6",
    "created_at": "2025-11-01T09:50:00.859217Z",
    "updated_at": "2025-11-01T09:50:00.859217Z"
}
